                <LanePosition roadId="1" laneId="-1" s="125.0">
                  <Orientation type="relative" r="1.5" />
                </LanePosition>
              </Position>
            </Vertex>
            <Vertex time="3.5">
              <Position>
                <LanePosition roadId="1" laneId="-1" s="130.0">
                  <Orientation type="relative" r="1.5" />
                </LanePosition>
              </Position>
            </Vertex>
            <Vertex time="4">
              <Position>
                <LanePosition roadId="1" laneId="-1" s="130.0">
                  <Orientation type="relative" r="1.5" />
                </LanePosition>
              </Position>
            </Vertex>

        </Shape>
      </Trajectory>
      <TimeReference>
        <Timing domainAbsoluteRelative="relative" offset="0" scale="1" />

</PrivateAction>
